type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Sulphuric acid is neutralized on site (pH > 6), and in 2004 it was estimated using an evaporation model that 1 kg could escape to the atmosphere.  In 2005, releases were assumed as '0 kg' as per OWNERS instructions.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Ammonia is used on site as a refrigerant.  In 2005, no ammonia was purchased to re-fill the system; therefore, no ammonia was lost to the atmosphere.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: 3.5 tonnes was released in 2001 as the result of a spill

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: In November and December of 2020, one of the two transformers for the site went down. Two diesel generators were brought to site to supplement the electricity usage of the facility and brought the total of PM2.5 above the reportable threshold.
